# zabbix_user (Data Source)

Fetches a Zabbix user by `id` or `username`. Exactly one of `id` or `username` must be provided.

## Example Usage

```terraform
# Look up a Zabbix user by username
data "zabbix_user" "by_username" {
  username = "Admin"
}

# Look up a Zabbix user by ID
data "zabbix_user" "by_id" {
  id = "1"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Optional

- `id` (String) Unique identifier of the user. One of `id` or `username` must be set.
- `username` (String) Login name of the user. Unique per Zabbix instance. One of `id` or `username` must be set.

### Read-Only

- `name` (String) First name of the user.
- `role_id` (String) ID of the role assigned to the user.
- `surname` (String) Last name of the user.
- `type` (String) User permission level: `user`, `admin`, or `super_admin`.
